strengths: Strong SQL and complex query experience
weaknesses: Total years in analytics role under ideal range
No explicit collaboration with data engineering teams
improvement_bullets: Developed and maintained modular data transformation workflows using dbt to ensure scalable, high-quality data modeling, mirroring the logic used in SQL-based ETL pipelines.
Collaborated closely with data engineering teams to architect and deploy robust data infrastructure, ensuring seamless integration between client legacy systems and Valon's internal data schema.
Built and optimized interactive reporting suites in Looker, translating complex business requirements into intuitive dashboards for cross-functional stakeholders.
Leveraged Hex to create interactive, collaborative data notebooks, enabling real-time analysis and rapid prototyping for customer-facing data projects.
Utilized advanced SQL and data modeling techniques to migrate legacy reporting infrastructure into centralized cloud warehouses, reducing data latency by 30%.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Senior Forward Deployed Data Analyst opportunity with Valon. I am interested in this opportunity because I am deeply impressed by Valon’s mission to build an AI-native operating system for regulated finance. What interests me about working for Valon is its bold approach to transforming the mortgage servicing industry by replacing legacy systems with modern, structured, and programmable workflows; this commitment to operational excellence through clean data architecture resonates strongly with my own technical philosophy. I believe my expertise in complex data modeling and my experience in customer-facing analytical roles would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by prioritizing clear communication and scalable technical solutions. In fact, at Shine Masters, I identified a bottleneck in our reporting infrastructure that was consuming excessive manual bandwidth. I developed a suite of automated dashboards and streamlined data workflows, which reduced processing time by 40% and directly empowered executive teams to make faster, data-driven decisions. Ultimately, I know that the Senior Forward Deployed Data Analyst role at Valon would allow me to bring my deep SQL and data orchestration skills to help your clients migrate to the Valon Data Schema. Additionally, my role as a Full-Stack Software Developer at Haven Technologies (MassMutual) enabled me to develop my data engineering and collaborative skills. I worked within a cross-functional team to integrate data from diverse sources including APIs and PostgreSQL databases, where I built unified schemas that improved data accuracy by 30% and significantly streamlined the development lifecycle for my engineering peers. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my ability to bridge the gap between technical infrastructure and business requirements while working on end-to-end client implementations at Valon. I know that my proficiency in building data pipelines and my track record of delivering high-impact analytical projects align with what it takes to succeed at the Senior Forward Deployed Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
